# YAAF-Common

> YAAF (Yet Another Application Framework) — a foundational Go library of interfaces and utilities for building microservices with clean architecture and loose coupling.

All signatures below reflect the actual code in this repository. When in doubt, read the interface files listed under "Key files" rather than guessing — the public API is interface-driven and deliberately explicit.

## Overview

YAAF-Common defines standard interfaces for infrastructure components (relational DB, document store, cache, message bus) plus in-memory implementations of each for fast, dependency-free testing. Business logic depends on the interfaces; concrete adapters (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Kafka, etc.) live in separate `go-yaaf/*` packages.

## Key features

- **Interface-driven**: code against `IDatabase`, `IDatastore`, `IDataCache`, `IMessageBus` — never concrete types.
- **In-memory implementations**: every interface has one, for unit/integration tests without external services.
- **Entity model**: all domain objects implement the `Entity` interface (`ID/TABLE/NAME/KEY`) and usually embed `BaseEntity`.
- **Fluent query builder**: `db.Query(factory).Filter(F("field").Gte(x)).Sort("name").Find()`.
- **Minimal dependencies**: `google/uuid` and `wneessen/go-mail` only (plus `golang.org/x/text` indirect).

## Key files (read these for exact contracts)

- `database/database.go` — `IDatabase` (RDBMS CRUD, bulk, field updates, query)
- `database/datastore.go` — `IDatastore` (NoSQL document store)
- `database/datacache.go` — `IDataCache` (entity-oriented key/hash/list cache + distributed lock)
- `database/query.go` — `IQuery` (fluent query/aggregation builder)
- `database/query_filter.go` — `QueryFilter` builder (`F(field).Eq(...)`, etc.)
- `database/query_operator.go` — `QueryOperator` constants
- `entity/entity.go` — `Entity`, `BaseEntity`, `BaseEntityEx`, ID generators, factories
- `messaging/message_bus.go` — `IMessageBus`, producer/consumer
- `messaging/messages.go` — `IMessage`, `BaseMessage`, `Message[T]`, constructors
- `config/base_config.go` — `BaseConfig` singleton (`config.Get()`)
- `logger/logger.go` — slog-based structured logging

## Core components

### Entity (`entity/`)
`Entity` interface: `ID() string`, `TABLE() string`, `NAME() string`, `KEY() string`.
Embed `BaseEntity` (fields `Id`, `CreatedOn`, `UpdatedOn` — `CreatedOn/UpdatedOn` are `Timestamp` = `int64` epoch **milliseconds**). `BaseEntityEx` adds `Flag int64` (soft-delete/status) and `Props Json` (`map[string]any`).
`EntityFactory` is `func() Entity` — passed to database/cache calls so the library can build typed instances.
Package-level ID generators: `ID()`, `IDN()`, `ShortID(delta...)`, `ShortIDN(delta...)`, `NanoID()`, `GUID()`.

### Database (`database/`)
- `IDatabase` — RDBMS: `Get/List/Exists/Insert/Update/Upsert/Delete`, `Bulk*`, `SetField(s)`, `Query(factory) IQuery`.
- `IDatastore` — NoSQL document store, same shape as `IDatabase`.
- `IDataCache` — entity-oriented cache: `Get(factory,key)/Set(key,entity,exp...)`, raw variants (`GetRaw/SetRaw`), `SetNX`, `Del`, `Exists`, `Scan`, hash ops (`HGet/HSet/...`), list ops (`RPush/LPop/...`), and `ObtainLocker` for distributed locks.
- In-memory constructors take **no arguments**: `NewInMemoryDatabase()`, `NewInMemoryDatastore()`, `NewInMemoryDataCache()` — each returns `(iface, error)`.

### Messaging (`messaging/`)
- `IMessageBus`: pub/sub (`Subscribe/Unsubscribe/Publish`), queue (`Push/Pop`), and producer/consumer factories. `NewInMemoryMessageBus()` for tests.
- Messages implement `IMessage` (`Topic/OpCode/Addressee/SessionId/Version/Payload`). Use generic `Message[T]`; build with `GetMessage[T](topic, payload)`; supply a `MessageFactory` (`func() IMessage`) to subscribers.

### Config (`config/`)
Singleton: `cfg := config.Get()`. Values come from environment variables. Typed getters: `GetStringParamValueOrDefault`, `GetIntParamValueOrDefault`, `GetBoolParamValueOrDefault`, plus named accessors (`DatabaseUri()`, `DataCacheUri()`, `MessagingUri()`, `LogLevel()`, ...). There is **no** `NewConfig()` constructor.

### Logging (`logger/`)
Built on Go `log/slog`. Configure with `SetLevel`, `EnableJsonFormat`, `EnableCaller`, then `Init()`. Log with printf-style `logger.Debug/Info/Warn/Error/Fatal(format, args...)`.

### Utilities (`utils/`)
`collections` (thread-safe map/set/queue), `pool` (worker pool), `cache`/`cache2` (in-process generic caches with `GetOrDefault`/`Val`), `nanoid`, `binary`, `mail`, `Aggregator`, plus `hash_utils.go`, `http_utils.go`, `json_utils.go`, `string_utils.go`, `time_utils.go`. Also top-level `rest/`, `metrics/`, `files/`.

## Canonical patterns

### Define an entity + factory
```go
type User struct {
    entity.BaseEntity
    Name   string `json:"name"`
    Age    int    `json:"age"`
    Status string `json:"status"`
}

func (u *User) TABLE() string { return "user" }

// Factory used by db/cache calls
func NewUser() entity.Entity { return &User{} }
```

### In-memory infrastructure (tests)
```go
db, _ := database.NewInMemoryDatabase()
cache, _ := database.NewInMemoryDataCache()   // no args
bus, _ := messaging.NewInMemoryMessageBus()
```

### CRUD
```go
added, _ := db.Insert(&User{Name: "John", Age: 30})   // added Entity
e, _ := db.Get(NewUser, added.ID())                    // e is entity.Entity
user := e.(*User)                                      // type-assert to concrete
user.Age = 31
_, _ = db.Update(user)
_ = db.Delete(NewUser, user.ID())
```

### Query (fluent; execute with Find/List/Count/...)
```go
list, total, err := db.Query(NewUser).
    Filter(database.F("age").Gte(30)).
    Filter(database.F("status").Eq("active")).
    Sort("name").   // ascending; "name-" (trailing dash) for descending
    Page(0).        // 0-based
    Limit(10).
    Find()          // returns (out []Entity, total int64, err error)
```

### Cache (entity-oriented)
```go
_ = cache.Set("user:"+user.ID(), user, 5*time.Minute)
e, err := cache.Get(NewUser, "user:"+user.ID())        // returns entity.Entity
// raw bytes: cache.SetRaw(key, bytes, exp...) / cache.GetRaw(key)
```

### Messaging
```go
type UserEvent = messaging.Message[*User]              // generic message
factory := func() messaging.IMessage { return messaging.NewMessage[*User]() }

sub, _ := bus.Subscribe("user-svc", factory, func(m messaging.IMessage) bool {
    u := m.Payload().(*User)
    _ = u
    return true // ack
}, "user.created")

msg := messaging.GetMessage[*User]("user.created", user)
_ = bus.Publish(msg)
_ = bus.Unsubscribe(sub)
```

## Testing
```bash
go test ./...            # all packages
go test ./database       # one package
go test -cover ./...     # with coverage
```
The `test/` directory holds sample entities and integration tests.

## Dependencies
- Go 1.24.0+
- github.com/google/uuid v1.6.0
- github.com/wneessen/go-mail v0.7.2

## More detail
See `llms-full.txt` for the complete interface reference, gotchas, and worked examples.
Repository: https://github.com/go-yaaf/yaaf-common — License: Apache 2.0.
